title: Step up to social work: regional partnerships
body: "This list shows the regional partnerships for the 2026 applicants of step up to social work.  The regional partnership information may change if there is a future cohort of the programme.  As part of the application process, applicants choose the regional partnership they would like to apply to. They can also indicate their preferred local authority areas in that chosen region, depending on availability.  Read more about the Step up to social work programme. "

taxons.title: Becoming a children's social care provider
